sections.paragraph:
m. with suff. חֶטְאִי plur. חֲטָאִים const. חֲטָאֵי (which is from the form חָטָא).

[1] sin, fault, Lev 19:17 22:9 . הָיָה חֵטְא בְּ to be sin against any one, i.e. for him to be reckoned guilty in the matter, Deu 15:9.

[“(2) penalty of sin, hence calamity, Lament. 3:39 .” Thes.]
